calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-11-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: J. Willis,
CSR: B. Fields, #7235
MICHAEL ROSSOFF, Esq. for Plaintiff: TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEV CORP.
Plaintiff's Witness ELIZABETH MCLAUGHLIN was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by Defendant ZHENYA VALIT.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for Judgment as follows:

Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 477 O'FARRELL ST., #807, SF, CA 94102.
The lease is forfeited.
RENTS & PER DIEM DAMAGES - $480.69
Costs - WAIVED
Total - $480.69
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-11-2011 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-06-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 514 Judge: Ellen Chaitin; Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha; Not Reported.
